Total of the investment transaction (unit * unit price + commission)
totalAccountBalance(Ledger) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Account
Calculates the accountâ€™s balance by summing its opening balance and all AccountingEntry records for this account in the provided Ledger.

Returns the uppercase string representation of this account type.

TransactionQueryFacade - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Facade that provides a configurable way to query transactions and map the results into arbitrary JavaBeans (including the SCA report beans).
TransactionQueryFacade(Supplier<List<AccountingTransaction>>) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query.TransactionQueryFacade
Builds a facade that reads transactions from the provided supplier.
TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Immutable configuration for running a transaction query.
TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig.Builder - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Builder for TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig.
TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord - Record Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Result of a transaction query that captures the parent transaction and the entries that were used for filtering.
TransactionRecord(AccountingTransaction, List<AccountingEntry>) - Constructor for record class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query.TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord
Creates an instance of a TransactionRecord record class.
